title: 10 Herbal Teas For Inflammatory Bowel Disease
description: Peumus boldus teas contains anti-inflammatory compounds like boldine, which has been shown to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues. The active compounds in the tea, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, help to calm down the digestive tract and reduce oxidative stress. This can be beneficial for people with inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), as it may help to reduce symptoms like abdominal pain, diarrhea, and weight loss.
